title: Implement WakeTask's Object Proof mission pack as three staged feature slices with evals, learnin...

goal.value: Implement WakeTask's Object Proof mission pack as three staged feature slices with evals, learnings, and final postmortem

inputs.target_audience: Heavy sleepers and consumer iPhone users who need forced engagement to wake up reliably
inputs.feature_goal: Add barcode/QR, preset local Vision object-photo, and same-object reference-photo missions that are easy to configure, funny to demonstrate, and impossible to dismiss until proof succeeds.

dockerfile.value:
FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
ENV BUN_INSTALL=/root/.bun
ENV PATH="/root/.fabro/bin:/root/.bun/bin:/root/.local/bin:/root/.qlty/bin:${PATH}"
WORKDIR /home/daytona

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends bash ca-certificates curl gh git jq openssh-client python3 python3-pip pipx ripgrep shellcheck sqlite3 unzip xz-utils && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - && apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends nodejs && npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code@2.1.141 @openai/codex promptfoo && npm cache clean --force && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash -s "bun-v1.2.22" && ln -sf /root/.bun/bin/bun /usr/local/bin/bun

RUN pipx install spec-kitty-cli==3.1.8 && curl -fsSL https://qlty.sh | sh && ln -sf /root/.qlty/bin/qlty /usr/local/bin/qlty

RUN set -eux; target="x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu"; asset="fabro-${target}.tar.gz"; url="$(curl -fsSL https://api.github.com/repos/fabro-sh/fabro/releases/latest | jq -r --arg asset "$asset" '.assets[] | select(.name == $asset) | .browser_download_url')"; test -n "$url"; curl -fsSL "$url" -o /tmp/fabro.tar.gz; tar -xzf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz -C /tmp; install -m 0755 "/tmp/fabro-${target}/fabro" /usr/local/bin/fabro; rm -rf /tmp/fabro.tar.gz "/tmp/fabro-${target}"; fabro --version

CMD ["/bin/bash"]

goal.String: Implement WakeTask's Object Proof mission pack as three staged feature slices with evals, learnings, and final postmortem

secret_policy.String: no secrets; credential checks are presence-only; do not print environment variables or credential values

spec.graph_source:
digraph WakeTaskObjectProofProgram {
    graph [
        goal="Implement WakeTask Object Proof missions as staged feature slices: barcode scan, preset Apple Vision object recognition, then same-object matching, carrying learnings forward after each stage",
        persona="waketask-object-proof-program-orchestrator",
        inputs="repo_url,base_branch,run_branch,app_name,bundle_id,app_dir,app_domain,target_audience,feature_goal,context_paths,use_mobbin_mcp,ios_validation_mode,allow_macos_deferred,fabro_server",
        outputs="workflow_preflight,program_spec,barcode_stage,barcode_learnings,preset_vision_stage,preset_vision_learnings,same_object_stage,same_object_learnings,publish_handoff,program_postmortem",
        artifact_root=".workflow/object-proof-program",
        secret_policy="no secrets; credential checks are presence-only; do not print environment variables or credential values",
        default_max_retries=2,
        retry_target="program_spec_child",
        model_stylesheet="
            *       { backend: cli; provider: openai; model: gpt-5.3-codex-spark; reasoning_effort: low; }
            .build  { backend: cli; provider: openai; model: gpt-5.3-codex; reasoning_effort: high; }
            .review { backend: cli; provider: openai; model: gpt-5.3-codex; reasoning_effort: high; }
        "
    ]
    rankdir=LR

    start [shape=Mdiamond, label="Start"]
    exit  [shape=Msquare, label="Exit"]

    workflow_preflight_child [
        label="Workflow Preflight Child",
        type="stack.manager_loop",
        stack.child_workflow="./object-proof-program-preflight-stage.fabro",
        manager.max_cycles=120,
        manager.poll_interval="1s"
    ]

    program_spec_child [
        label="Program Spec Child",
        type="stack.manager_loop",
        stack.child_workflow="./object-proof-program-spec-stage.fabro",
        manager.max_cycles=180,
        manager.poll_interval="2s"
    ]

    barcode_stage_child [
        label="Barcode Stage Child",
        type="stack.manager_loop",
        stack.child_workflow="./object-proof-barcode-stage.fabro",
        manager.max_cycles=900,
        manager.poll_interval="10s"
    ]

    barcode_learning_child [
        label="Barcode Learning Child",
        type="stack.manager_loop",
        stack.child_workflow="./object-proof-barcode-learning-stage.fabro",
        manager.max_cycles=180,
        manager.poll_interval="2s"
    ]

    preset_vision_stage_child [
        label="Preset Vision Stage Child",
        type="stack.manager_loop",
        stack.child_workflow="./object-proof-preset-vision-stage.fabro",
        manager.max_cycles=900,
        manager.poll_interval="10s"
    ]

    preset_vision_learning_child [
        label="Preset Vision Learning Child",
        type="stack.manager_loop",
        stack.child_workflow="./object-proof-preset-vision-learning-stage.fabro",
        manager.max_cycles=180,
        manager.poll_interval="2s"
    ]

    same_object_stage_child [
        label="Same Object Stage Child",
        type="stack.manager_loop",
        stack.child_workflow="./object-proof-same-object-stage.fabro",
        manager.max_cycles=900,
        manager.poll_interval="10s"
    ]

    same_object_learning_child [
        label="Same Object Learning Child",
        type="stack.manager_loop",
        stack.child_workflow="./object-proof-same-object-learning-stage.fabro",
        manager.max_cycles=180,
        manager.poll_interval="2s"
    ]

    publish_postmortem_child [
        label="Publish And Program Postmortem Child",
        type="stack.manager_loop",
        stack.child_workflow="./object-proof-publish-postmortem-stage.fabro",
        manager.max_cycles=240,
        manager.poll_interval="2s"
    ]

    start -> workflow_preflight_child
    workflow_preflight_child -> program_spec_child [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    workflow_preflight_child -> workflow_preflight_child [label="Fix Workflow/Environment"]
    program_spec_child -> barcode_stage_child [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    program_spec_child -> program_spec_child [label="Fix Program Spec"]
    barcode_stage_child -> barcode_learning_child [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    barcode_stage_child -> barcode_stage_child [label="Fix Barcode Stage"]
    barcode_learning_child -> preset_vision_stage_child [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    barcode_learning_child -> barcode_learning_child [label="Fix Barcode Learnings"]
    preset_vision_stage_child -> preset_vision_learning_child [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    preset_vision_stage_child -> preset_vision_stage_child [label="Fix Preset Vision Stage"]
    preset_vision_learning_child -> same_object_stage_child [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    preset_vision_learning_child -> preset_vision_learning_child [label="Fix Preset Vision Learnings"]
    same_object_stage_child -> same_object_learning_child [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    same_object_stage_child -> same_object_stage_child [label="Fix Same Object Stage"]
    same_object_learning_child -> publish_postmortem_child [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    same_object_learning_child -> same_object_learning_child [label="Fix Same Object Learnings"]
    publish_postmortem_child -> exit [condition="outcome=succeeded"]
    publish_postmortem_child -> publish_postmortem_child [label="Complete Publish/Postmortem"]
}
